name: Nager.Date
description: List public holidays for a country and year, get the next upcoming public holidays for a country, and list supported countries.

auth.hint: Nager.Date is a free, unauthenticated API; no credential is required.

tools.name: list_public_holidays
tools.description: List all public holidays for a country in a given year.

params.name: countryCode
params.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code, such as US.

tools.name: list_next_public_holidays
tools.description: List the next upcoming public holidays for a country from today.

params.name: countryCode
params.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code, such as US.

tools.name: list_available_countries
tools.description: List countries supported by the public holidays endpoints.
